description: Browser agent — navigates pages with Chromium and exposes task-level skills over HTTP A2A.

skills.name: Browser Task (generalist)
skills.description: Drive a browser with an LLM-in-the-loop planner to accomplish a free-form intent. Input JSON {"intent":"...","allowedHosts":["host","*.host","*"],"url":"optional start","credentialId":"optional","maxSteps":60,"maxSeconds":120}. allowedHosts is required and empty rejects. Returns a structured JSON result with status (done/failed/incomplete), summary, optional result, step count, and navigations.

skills.name: Learn Form Schema
skills.description: Navigate to a URL, introspect the first form, and return a typed FormSchema (fields, types, required, options, dependencies). Persists the schema as a skill at sites/{host}/forms/{slug} for later reuse by execute-form-batch.

skills.name: Execute Form Batch
skills.description: Given a learned FormSchema (by ref or inline) and a batch of row data, submit the form once per row. Streams per-row progress. Default mode abort-on-first; opt into 'continue' for known-messy batches.
